html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.3 doses with booster dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Expiration
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Due Date
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Create
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Overdue
First Hib dose from the primary series was administered
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered
Third Hib dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
One Hib booster dose was administered. Hib immunization schedule has been completed

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.3 doses with booster dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG
